ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "upc14" TEXT /* 14-digit Universal Product Code */,
  "upc12" TEXT /* 12-digit Universal Product Code */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., each, pack) */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., size, color) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., large, red) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, warehouse staff, supplier) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
